title: Lemon Olive Oil Cake
description: This lemon olive oil cake recipe is incredibly moist and filled with bright, fruity flavor. Made with simple ingredients, it's an easy, delicious treat!

content.text: This lemon olive oil cake recipe is my new favorite spring dessert. It has a moist and tender texture and fruity, citrusy flavor from lemon juice, lemon zest, and plenty of olive oil.
This olive oil cake recipe is easy to make with simple ingredients and equipment. I love to whip it up for an everyday treat to enjoy with coffee or tea.
Here’s what you’ll need to make this lemon olive oil cake recipe: olive oil, flour, fresh lemons, baking powder, baking soda, eggs, sugar, milk, vanilla extract, and salt.
How to Make Olive Oil Cake
First, make the batter. In a medium bowl, whisk together the dry ingredients. In a large bowl, combine the lemon zest and sugar, then add the wet ingredients and whisk.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and whisk until just combined.
Transfer the batter to a greased cake pan and bake at 350°F for 40 to 50 minutes.
Tap the pan before baking to release air bubbles. Tent with foil if the cake browns too quickly.
How to Store Olive Oil Cake
Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 4 days or refrigerate for up to a week.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F and grease a 9-inch round pan.
Mix lemon zest and sugar, then add wet ingredients.
Pour batter into pan and bake 40–50 minutes.
